# HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar

PostgreSQL-backed long-term memory for Hermes & OpenClaw AI agents. Docker-based sidecar with Dashboard, CLI, MCP (20 tools), and REST API. Zero API keys (Ollama local embeddings). Bi-temporal versioning, knowledge graph, episodic memory, auto-import from Hermes sessions.

## Docs
- README: https://github.com/SunMe1977/HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar#readme
- AGENTS.md: https://github.com/SunMe1977/HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar/blob/main/AGENTS.md
- ClawHub Skill: https://clawhub.ai/sunme1977/skills/hermesclawzero-auto-memory
- Changelog: https://github.com/SunMe1977/HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

## Quick Start
```
git clone https://github.com/SunMe1977/HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar.git
cd HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar
cp .env.example .env
docker compose --profile ollama up -d --build
```
Dashboard: http://localhost:8010/dashboard

## Key Features
- Zero API keys (Ollama embeddings, local-only)
- Dashboard with Memory Galaxy v3 visualization + filter/search
- Bi-temporal versioning: `/why/{id}`, `/timeline`
- Knowledge graph: entities, relationships, GraphRAG (`/graph/rag`)
- Episodic memory: `/episodic/timeline` for events/milestones/decisions
- 20 MCP tools (capture, search, ask, graph, timeline, optimizer, etc.)
- MCP auto-discovery via `mcp.json`
- CLI: `python memory.py capture/search/autosave`
- GitHub Actions CI: lint + test + docker build on every PR
- Auto-update, auto-import from Hermes sessions, auto-dedup
- ClawHub skill: `openclaw skills install @sunme1977/hermesclawzero-auto-memory`
- pgvector HNSW index, 7 covering indexes, 10K-scale tuning
